frame_analyses.description: Gauze suspended between clamps with 4cm diameter circle marked. Setup complete, instruments visible.
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Good setup with clear circular pattern marked on gauze

frame_analyses.description: Right instrument (scissors) approaching gauze to begin cutting at marked line
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Instrument positioned to start cutting, appears to be approaching tangentially to circle

frame_analyses.description: Cutting in progress along the marked circular line, moving clockwise from bottom of circle
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Steady cutting motion, maintaining contact with marked line

frame_analyses.description: Continuing clockwise cut around right side of circle, approximately 25% complete
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Good tracking along marked line, consistent cutting depth

frame_analyses.description: Cutting progressed to top-right portion of circle, approximately 40% complete
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Maintaining good line adherence, some minor wavering visible

frame_analyses.description: Cut has progressed approximately 60% around circle, now at upper left quadrant
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Cut appears to deviate slightly outside marked line in several areas

frame_analyses.description: Nearing completion of circular cut, approximately 80% complete
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Some areas show deviation from marked line, but gauze remains attached to clamps

frame_analyses.description: Circular cut appears complete, center portion separated from surrounding gauze
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Task completed, gauze still attached to clamps, center piece cut out

penalties.description: Multiple areas where cut deviates from marked line, estimated average 1-2mm deviation at several points

confidence_rationale: Completion time well-observed and cutting progression clear. Deviation measurements estimated from overhead view with some uncertainty due to camera angle and lighting. Gauze remained attached to clamps throughout.
cannot_determine: Exact mm deviation at all 8 cardinal points due to camera angle limitations
Precise measurement of some deviation areas due to gauze texture and lighting
technique_summary: Intermediate-level performance with systematic clockwise cutting approach. Completion time of 120 seconds falls in intermediate range. Some precision issues with line adherence but task completed successfully.
improvement_suggestions: Focus on more precise line following to reduce deviation penalties
Consider smaller, more controlled cutting motions for better precision
Practice maintaining consistent distance from marked line throughout cut
